mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(st_avatar_url, '') AS stAvatarUrl, COALESCE(st_chat_file_name, '') AS stChatFileName FROM app_conversation_st_binding WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id AS id, COALESCE(st_avatar_url, '') AS stAvatarUrl, COALESCE(avatar_url, '') AS avatarUrl, COALESCE(cover_url, '') AS coverUrl, COALESCE(chat_background_url, '') AS chatBackgroundUrl FROM app_character WHERE owner_user_id = #{userId}

SELECT asset_url FROM ( SELECT photo_url AS asset_url FROM app_user WHERE id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT avatar AS asset_url FROM app_h5_user_profile_ext WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) assets WHERE asset_url IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(asset_url) != ''
